title: neurogramma quinata
intro: Neurogramma quinata, also known as the five-lobed neurogramma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Neurogramma quinata has been found to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
